dev-backend.description: Backend development guide. API design, architecture patterns, database optimization, error handling, security, logging.
dev-backend.desc_ko: Backend development guide. API design, architecture patterns, database optimization, error handling, security, logging.
dev-backend.desc_en: Backend role guide. Express.js patterns, SQLite, error handling, security basics.

dev-data.name: Dev Data
dev-data.description: Data engineering and analysis guide. Pipelines, ETL/ELT, data quality, SQL optimization, reporting, architecture decisions.
dev-data.desc_ko: Data engineering and analysis guide. Pipelines, ETL/ELT, data quality, SQL optimization, reporting, architecture decisions.
dev-data.desc_en: Data role guide. ETL pipelines, CSV/JSON processing, SQL queries, analysis.

dev-testing.name: Dev Testing
dev-testing.description: 디버깅 phase 전용. Playwright 웹앱 테스팅, 정찰-행동 패턴.
dev-testing.desc_ko: 디버깅 phase 전용. Playwright 웹앱 테스팅, 정찰-행동 패턴.
dev-testing.desc_en: Debugging phase only. Playwright web app testing, recon-action pattern.

dev-code-reviewer.name: Dev Code Reviewer
dev-code-reviewer.description: Code review guide. Review process, quality thresholds, antipatterns, giving/receiving feedback. Available to all agents.

dev-code-reviewer.desc_en: Code review guide. Review process, quality thresholds, antipatterns, giving/receiving feedback. Available to all agents.

dev-pabcd.name: Dev PABCD
dev-pabcd.description: PABCD orchestration workflow. Plan → Audit → Build → Check → Done. 구조화된 멀티스텝 개발 with human checkpoints.
dev-pabcd.desc_ko: PABCD orchestration workflow. Plan → Audit → Build → Check → Done. 구조화된 멀티스텝 개발 with human checkpoints.
dev-pabcd.desc_en: PABCD orchestration workflow for structured multi-step development with human checkpoints between phases.

dev-scaffolding.name: Dev Scaffolding
dev-scaffolding.description: Lidge Standard 프로젝트 스캐폴딩. Feature-based + Colocation + Barrel Export + devlog 구조.

dev-scaffolding.desc_en: Scaffold projects following the Lidge Standard: feature-based layout, colocation, barrel exports, devlog structure.

api-design-reviewer.name: API Design Reviewer
api-design-reviewer.description: REST API design review: naming conventions, HTTP methods, pagination, error formats, versioning, breaking changes, rate limiting.

api-design-reviewer.desc_en: REST API design review: naming conventions, HTTP methods, pagination, error formats, versioning, breaking changes, rate limiting.

database-designer.desc_en: Schema design, normalization (1NF–BCNF), index optimization, migration strategies, partitioning, database selection guide.

pdf-vision.name: PDF Vision (하이브리드)
pdf-vision.description: PDF 하이브리드 추출: 이미지 렌더링(pypdfium2) + 텍스트 추출(pypdf). 시험/표/수식 분석에 최적.
pdf-vision.desc_ko: PDF 하이브리드 추출: 이미지 렌더링(pypdfium2) + 텍스트 추출(pypdf). 시험/표/수식 분석에 최적.
pdf-vision.desc_en: Hybrid PDF extraction: image rendering (pypdfium2) + text extraction (pypdf). Optimized for exams, tables, and formulas.
